auth.whyQuimeraSubtitle: Everything you need to create stunning websites
auth.whyDifferentSubtitle: We don't just give you a blank canvas. We give you a superpowered engine that builds alongside you.
auth.instantCreationDesc: Describe your business, and get a full multi-page site in 30 seconds.
auth.aiWriterDesc: No lorem ipsum. Our AI writes persuasive copy tailored to your brand tone.
auth.globalSystemDesc: Change fonts, colors, and styles across your entire site with one click.
auth.imageGenDesc: Need a cyberpunk cityscape? A minimalist coffee shop? A 3D render of your product? Quimera AI creates stunning 4K, royalty-free images with professional lighting, camera angles, and color grading—all from a simple text prompt.
auth.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about creating your dream website with Quimera.ai.
auth.q1: How is Quimera different from other builders?
auth.a1: Quimera isn't just a drag-and-drop tool; it's an AI co-pilot. You describe your vision, and our engine generates the layout, writes the copy, and creates custom images instantly. It handles the heavy lifting so you can focus on your brand.
auth.q2: Do I need any coding skills?
auth.a2: Absolutely not. Quimera is designed for everyone. You can build complex, professional-grade websites using simple natural language commands or our intuitive visual editor.
auth.a3: Yes! You own your content. On our Pro plans, you can export your site's HTML/CSS code to host anywhere, or publish directly with our ultra-fast global hosting.
auth.a4: Yes, you can start building for free. You get access to our core features and AI tools to design your site. You only need to upgrade when you're ready to publish to a custom domain.
auth.q5: How does the AI image generation work?
auth.a5: Quimera integrates the most advanced AI image generation technology (powered by Google's Gemini 3 Pro Image). It supports 4K resolution, advanced controls for lighting, camera angles, depth of field, and color grading. You can even use reference images as style guides. Simply type a prompt like 'a modern coffee shop in Tokyo with cinematic lighting', and it generates unique, royalty-free ultra HD images in seconds.
auth.authCard1Desc: Build websites in seconds with intelligent automation
auth.authCard2Desc: Professional designs that adapt to your content
auth.authCard3Desc: Change your entire site's look instantly
auth.authCard4Desc: Generate stunning visuals from text prompts
auth.authCard5Desc: Reusable blocks across all your pages
auth.authCard6Desc: See changes in real-time as you build

onboarding.descriptionHint: This will be used to generate content for your website. Be as detailed as possible.
onboarding.taglinePlaceholder: A short catchy phrase for your business
onboarding.errorGeneratingDescription: Failed to generate description. Please try again.
onboarding.errorGeneratingServices: Failed to generate services. Please try again.
onboarding.useAIOrAdd: Use AI to generate or add manually
onboarding.componentSettingsHint: Toggle components on/off based on your needs. AI has pre-selected the best options for your industry.
onboarding.step1Tip: Select the industry that best describes your business. This helps our AI generate relevant content for your website.
onboarding.step2Tip: Let our AI generate a professional description, then customize it to match your voice. You can always edit it later in the website editor.
onboarding.step4Tip: The AI analyzes your industry and business type to suggest the most suitable template and components. You can always customize everything later in the editor.
onboarding.step5Tip: All fields are optional. Add what you'd like to display on your website. You can always update this information later.
onboarding.step6Tip: Select at least one category. You can add more products and categories later in the ecommerce dashboard.
onboarding.sellProductsOnlineDesc: We will include a store in your website
onboarding.ecommerceSuggestion: Your industry usually involves selling products. Do you want to add an online store?
onboarding.generatingContent: Creating personalized content for your website...
onboarding.websiteReadyDescription: Your website has been generated successfully. You can now customize it in the editor.
onboarding.storeCreatedDesc: You can add products from the ecommerce dashboard
onboarding.pleaseWait: This may take a few minutes. Please wait...
onboarding.generationTip: Our AI is analyzing your business and generating personalized content. Each image is created specifically for your brand.
onboarding.welcomeDescription: Let's get you set up quickly. Choose an option below to start.
onboarding.setupStoreDescription: Configure basic settings, shipping, and payment methods.
onboarding.addProductsDescription: Start populating your store with items for sale.
onboarding.customizeThemeDescription: Change colors, fonts, and layout to match your brand.
onboarding.launchStoreDescription: Make your store live and start selling to customers.
onboarding.viewDashboardDescription: See your sales, orders, and customer activity at a glance.
onboarding.manageOrdersDescription: Process new orders, update statuses, and print shipping labels.
onboarding.manageCustomersDescription: View customer profiles, order history, and contact information.
onboarding.exploreFeaturesDescription: Discover advanced tools for marketing, analytics, and growth.
